MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s unopposed motion for summary judgment is granted.

The court denies without prejudice Wells Fargo's premature request for costs and orders Wells Fargo to submit a proposed judgment with its proposed order that conforms to this ruling.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS)

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT SAUL BAMACA.

Keith Velleca's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed judicial council order (MC-053) which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
